title: PWA manifest + icons
notes: manifest.json + icons so Add to Home Screen shows a proper icon and name instead of a screenshot

title: iOS home-screen meta tags
notes: meta theme-color and apple-mobile-web-app-capable tags so the status bar goes black on home-screen launch

title: Fish color controls in menu
notes: Hue / saturation sliders or a color picker per species in the Fish menu

title: Koi color palette variety
notes: Currently a fixed list; expose palette selection in menu

title: Performance profiling pass
notes: Measure frame time on mid-range Android; identify bottlenecks

title: Edge-factor debug stat
notes: Add edge-factor to Entity Stats box (how deep the fish is in the wall-avoidance band)

title: Tap/touch → pixelated ripple
notes: Visual ripple at tap point — simple expanding ring, pixelated, no full fluid sim yet

title: 2D wave-propagation fluid grid
notes: CPU, discrete wave equation from GDD §8

title: Ripple injection from fish movement
notes: Body displacement → fluid grid

title: Ripple overlay renderer
notes: Fluid grid values → semi-transparent pixel overlay

title: Tap → inject ripple into fluid grid
notes: Replaces/extends E2-1 once the full fluid sim is in place

title: Ripple-driven pixel brightness
notes: Overlay values brighten fish outline pixels beneath

title: Rainbow ripple type
notes: Special ripple → rainbow color pass over fish outline pixels

title: ColorConfig struct on entities
notes: Mode (solid/rainbow/pulse), base RGB, speed — attached to each entity

title: Formalise render style enum
notes: outline and filled are the first two entries; replace the checkbox with a selector

title: gradient render style
notes: Fill uses a per-row brightness gradient (lighter belly, darker back)

title: glow render style
notes: Soft halo of dim pixels around the outline (offset copies at lower opacity)

title: Directional highlight pass
notes: Configurable light-source angle; compute highlight/shadow side of each entity

title: Style + color controls in Fish menu
notes: Integrate render style and color settings into the Fish section of the menu

title: Border color control
notes: Border is currently hardcoded white; add a color picker or hue control

title: 5.5-second breathing circle
notes: Ambient pulsing circle overlay — slow inhale/exhale rhythm from GDD

title: Ambient clock
notes: Thematically consistent clock display from GDD

title: Fish socializing state machine
notes: Approach, face, kiss / follow outcomes — see GDD

title: _neighborCount → socialize trigger
notes: Low neighbor count → seek company; high count → peel off

title: bubble entity
notes: Rising circle that pops at the top with a ripple event

title: lily_pad entity
notes: Static entity with very slow drift

title: Entity config file
notes: Register new entity types without code changes

title: Fish naming UI + Easter eggs
notes: Tap a fish → name input; special names in a list trigger different effects

title: Gyroscope / tilt controls
notes: Fish react to device orientation

title: PWA manifest + icons (deployment)
notes: Overlaps E1-1 and E1-2 — do together; completes the nightstand use-case

title: itch.io HTML5 export
notes: Zip dist/ and upload; confirm it plays correctly

title: itch.io page copy and screenshots
notes: Write store page copy and capture screenshots for the itch.io listing

title: Orientation-change handling
notes: Gracefully reflow canvas and UI when phone rotates

title: Google Play wrapper
notes: Long-term: Trusted Web Activity or similar

title: Steam / Electron wrapper
notes: Long-term: desktop distribution via Electron

title: Entity plugin API contract
notes: Define what a third-party entity class is allowed to read and write

title: Worker-based entity sandbox
notes: Proof of concept: run one entity type inside a Web Worker

title: Import whitelist static analyser
notes: Check import graph at load time before running plugin code

title: Fragment shader / visual pass DSL
notes: Design a restricted GLSL DSL or custom DSL for untrusted visual passes

title: Shader sandbox
notes: OffscreenCanvas / WebGL isolation for untrusted visual passes

title: Preset bundle format
notes: JSON: entity config + tuning + render style bundled together

title: In-app preset browser / importer
notes: UI for browsing and importing community preset bundles

title: Companion sharing site
notes: itch.io community page or self-hosted site for sharing presets
